summary: After defeating the drake, the protagonist settles accounts and uses the loot to upgrade his pet, Tengi, significantly boosting its stats and granting it a new skill. The Emperor tasks the protagonist with a new mission to deliver a message to the Eastern Continent, promising him the title of Count in return. Simultaneously, the protagonist coordinates with Kwon Yeongchan to expose and dismantle a match-fixing ring within the gaming arena.
key_moments: The protagonist finishes the drake quest and divides the loot, feeding the heart to Tengi.
The Emperor assigns the protagonist a new quest to deliver a message to the Eastern Continent.
The protagonist plans with Kwon Yeongchan to use community submissions to expose match-fixing.
